implemented_slice.bucket: metric_claim missing unit_normalized.unit_family plus metric unit_family other
implemented_slice.method: Added exact metric_name rules for audited engagement, data, count, count-rate, and population rows, plus one contextual unit override for tracks_program_outreach with unit individuals. No broad regex or global individuals/year alias was added.

data: records in largest dataset (Bus Hourly Ridership)

guardrails: Exact metric_name membership only for the missing-unit slice.
Inference remains inert when payload.unit or payload.unit_normalized already exists, except the single contextual tracks_program_outreach unit-normalized other correction.
Rules require finite numeric payload.value or finite value_min/value_max range.
Generic unit individuals remains unit_family other for unrelated metric names.
No date/year policy was introduced; unit year rows remain deferred.
No 2027 $M cost-per-rider scale policy was introduced.

materialization.result: Materialized 93067/98115 submissions; retired submissions skipped: 265; SQLite FTS quick_check: ok

validation.result: Issues: 0; submissions: 98115; canonical records: 84027; wiki pages: 7331

next_lanes: Audit admin/enforcement/safety count singletons such as audit_* and crash/fatality rows as separate bounded slices.
Keep score/rating, broad ridership, change-count, traffic-volume, vacancy/FTE, raw-only derailment/fire, and date/year policy rows deferred until a deterministic policy is accepted.
Continue re-running route/project duplicate gates after materialization; current route/project duplicate backlog remains closed.
